definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE both of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Both of them are correct.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para referirse a dos personas o cosas juntas (usado antes de 'the', 'my', 'them', 'us').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to refer to two people or things together (used before 'the', 'my', 'them', 'us').

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE none of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: None of the students failed.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Ni uno solo de un grupo de tres o más.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Not one of a group of three or more.

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE all of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: All of the people left.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: La cantidad total de un grupo específico.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The entire quantity of a specific group.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Algunos de / Algo de]
definitions.usage_example: Some of the students are here.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE some of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Some of the students are here.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Una cantidad o número no especificado de un grupo específico.]
definitions.usage_context_es: An unspecified amount or number of a specific group.

definitions.usage_example: Most of the food is gone.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE most of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Most of the food is gone.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: La mayor parte o número de un grupo específico.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The largest part or number of a specific group.

definitions.usage_example: Much of the time was wasted.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE much of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Much of the time was wasted.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Una gran cantidad de un sustantivo incontable específico.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A large amount of a specific uncountable noun.

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE each of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Each of the students passed.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para referirse a cada miembro individual de un grupo específico.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to refer to every individual member of a specific group.

definitions.usage_example: Either of the books is fine.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE either of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Either of the books is fine.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Uno u otro de dos cosas específicas (usado antes de 'the', 'my', 'them').]
definitions.usage_context_es: One or the other of two specific things (used before 'the', 'my', 'them').

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE neither of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Neither of them came.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Ni uno ni el otro de dos cosas específicas (usado antes de 'the', 'my', 'them').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Not one and not the other of two specific things (used before 'the', 'my', 'them').

definitions.usage_example: Part of the problem is communication.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE part of AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Part of the problem is communication.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Una pieza o sección de un todo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A piece or section of a whole.

definitions.usage_example: I have never seen such a thing.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I have never seen such a thing.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para significar 'de este/ese tipo' o 'a este grado'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to mean 'of this/that kind' or 'to this degree'.

definitions.usage_example: It was such a good day.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: It was such a good day.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para énfasis (similar a 'so').]
